---
title: "Home"
---

The **webCAT** application brings Computerized Adaptive Testing (CAT) and Multi-Stage Testing (MST) to your [**Qualtrics**](https://www.qualtrics.com/) tests, surveys, and questionnaires.

In CAT, each test adapts to the respondent in real time. Participants see only the items that are most relevant to them, making the experience shorter, more engaging, and more precise.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**webCAT** can implement

-   both fixed-length CAT and variable-length CAT based on either the estimated item parameters from an IRT model ~~or the raw items scores of the respondents in a norm sample~~.

-   MST based either the estimated item parameters from an IRT model, the raw items scores of the respondents in a norm sample, or the *p*-values reported in the literature (Approximate MST).

Detailed instructions are provided under the *Procedure* tab.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The access token

-   If you would like to use your own data, you must first generate an access token by clicking the "Generate Token" button below.

-   If you would like to use one of the example datasets or have previously generated a token, you can proceed directly to the Procedure tab.

```{=html}
<!-- MAIN HTML PAGE -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

<div style="
  background-color: rgba(24, 188, 156, 0.1);  /* #18bc9c with 20% opacity */
  border: 1px solid #18bc9c;
  padding: 20px;
">
  <div class="d-flex gap-0 mt-2">
  <!-- 1st row -->
    <fieldset class="flex-fill"> 
    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="newKey()">Generate Token</button>
    </fieldset>
    <fieldset class="flex-fill">
    
    <div class="flex-fill">
      The Generated Token Is:
  <code id="key" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: orange;"> </code>
    </div>
    </fieldset>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="d-flex mt-2 mb-2 gap-0">
  <small id="emailHelp" class="form-text text-muted">After the token is generated, enter your email address and click Send to receive the generated token by email.</small>
  </div>
  <div class="d-flex mt-3 mb-2 gap-0">
      
      <input id="email" type="text" class="form-control w-50" placeholder="Email Address"  aria-describedby="button-addon2">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" onclick="sendEmail()">   <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i>
</button>
  </div>
  
  
```
```{=html}
<script>
function newKey() {
  fetch("https://qualcat.duckdns.org/api/v0/personal-key", {
    method: 'GET', 
  })
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const key = data[0];
    document.querySelector("#key").textContent = key;
    alert("Please Copy and Paste the token somewhere safe or fill in your email address below to receive it via email.");
  })
  .catch(err => alert("Error: " + err));
}
</script>
```
```{=html}
<script>
function sendEmail() {
    const token = document.querySelector("#key").textContent;
    const email = document.getElementById("email").value;
  if (token == " ") {
  alert("Please generate a new token first.");
  return;}
  if (!email) {
  alert("Please fill in your email.");
  return;}
  //console.log(token); console.log(email);
 fetch("https://qualcat.duckdns.org/api/v0/SendTokenToEmail", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/json"
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({token, email})
    })
    .then(res => res.json())
    .then(data => {
        alert(data.message);
    })
    .catch(err => alert("Error: " + err));
}
</script>
```
```{=html}
<div class="text-end">
  <a href="procedure.html" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
    Get Started →
  </a>
</div>
```
